Whether you’re hitting the slopes, exploring the village or enjoying tobogganing at Windy Corner with Everest Sports, there’s plenty to experience this week.

We have a great lineup of events and activations, including Twilight Tuesdays, Thursday night fireworks, live music and après experiences throughout the resort.

Planning to go tobogganing? Book your Windy Corner session with Everest Sports here

Discover what’s happening across the village. Explore the What’s On page HERE

Hut","CrossCountryDescription":"Fair","CrossCountryGroomed":"Closed"}]},"CrossCountryMaintenance":{"CrossCountryReporterDate":"21 July 2026","CrossCountryComments":"Good morning, Last night it looked like we going to get a freeze but halfway through the fog rolled in and sent the humidity back up which made grooming a little more difficult. But once you walk up to the snowline you will find some good skiing considering the snow level, we have currently. we have groomed all of the inner trails that the conditions will allow for including the Nordic bowl and the aqueduct through to the dam wall. Panorama, the start of the sun valley loop and McKay rd is where you will find the best skiing. we had set classic track on panorama, McKay rd and into sun valley. Get out there and enjoy what skiing we do have ","CrossCountryConditions":"Spring","CrossCountryCover":"Fair","CrossCountryLastGroomed":"21 July 2026","CrossCountryTotalGroomed":"10","CrossCountryTotalGroomed24":"9"},"SlopeMaintenance":{"Comments":"","CubicMetersofSnow":"","CurrentStatus":"On","GroomerChoice":"-","LastUpdateDate":"05 July 2026","LastUpdateTime":"11:44 AM","AverageSnowMaking":"0"},"Parks":{"Park":[{"ParkName":"Castle Park","ParkDetail":"Ruined Castle","ParkStatus":"closed"},{"ParkName":"Drover's Dream Park","ParkDetail":"Top of Drover's Dream","ParkStatus":"closed"},{"ParkName":"Panorama Park","ParkDetail":"Drover's Dream","ParkStatus":"closed"}]},"Patrol":{"PatrolDate":"21 July 2026","PatrolTime":"6:01 AM","PatrolNaturalSnowDepth":"38","PatrolFreshSnow":"0","PatrolVillageBowl":"39","PatrolSunValley":"45","PatrolNorthSide":"30","PatrolLastSnowFall":"14 July 2026","SeasonalSnowfallToDate":"","PatrolSnowCover":"Good morning! We've had another clear night with humidity being very low. This has allowed for the snowmaking team to pump out a serious amount of snow, topping up areas that were brown, back to white and the guns are still blazing! We're looking at a top of 5 degrees today so layer appropriately. Off-piste terrain is still quite firm out there, pick of the morning will be our fresh groomers with nice, new, dry snowmaking. Keep your eyes to the horizon as Wednesday and Thursday may produce some snow. Be safe and have fun out there!","PatrolForecast":"Mostly sunny. Areas of frost and patchy fog this morning. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then tending northeast to southeasterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 15.","PatrolSnowChains":"Must be carried","PatrolRoadConditions":"Road Open: Beware icy patches","PatrolVillageRoadConditions":"Clear of
